event_description: Captured when a student account signup succeeds on the server.
Captured when a login succeeds and a session is created.
Captured when a signed-in user logs out from the navigation menu.
Captured when a user successfully publishes a post.
Captured when a direct message is successfully inserted.
Captured when a signed-in user submits feedback from the modal.
Captured when a user joins the Pro waitlist.
Captured when a Pro user opens the Stripe billing portal.
Captured when the Stripe webhook confirms checkout completion.
Captured when a user copies their referral signup link.
